brand_identity.name: Parasara Astro AI
brand_identity.tone: Mystical, Precise, Cosmic, Ancient Wisdom meets Future Tech

headings.usage: Page titles, Section headers, Chart titles

body.usage: Predictions, Chat, Form inputs, Data tables

landing_page.structure: Hero Section (Full viewport) -> Features Grid -> CTA
landing_page.hero_elements: Nebula background, Floating 3D Zodiac Wheel (optional/static image), Centered 'Get Reading' Button
landing_page.animation: Fade-in entrance, slow parallax on stars

app_shell.structure: Sidebar (Left, Collapsible on Mobile) + Main Content Area
app_shell.sidebar: History list, New Chat button, Settings

chart_view.center_content: User Details (Name, Rasi, Nakshatra) in the center 2x2 spanning cells
chart_view.outer_cells: The 12 Rashis (Fixed positions for South Indian style)

custom_components.name: CosmicCard
custom_components.description: A glassmorphism card with a subtle purple glow border on hover.
custom_components.base_class: relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md transition-all hover:border-violet-500/50

custom_components.name: StarButton
custom_components.description: Primary action button with a starry gradient.
custom_components.base_class: bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-600 to-indigo-600 hover:from-violet-500 hover:to-indigo-500 text-white shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(139,92,246,0.5)] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-cinzel tracking-wider

custom_components.name: SouthIndianChart
custom_components.specs: Grid container with 16 cells (4x4). Center 4 cells merged. Fixed Rashi positions. Dynamic Planet placement.

assets.icons: lucide-react (Stars, Moon, Sun, Sparkles, Scroll, History)

universal_guidelines: Use 'Cinzel' font for all spiritual/astrological terms (e.g., 'Rasi', 'Lagna', 'Dasha').
Use 'Inter' for all long-form text and chat responses.
ALWAYS use a dark theme. There is no light mode for this app.
Input fields should be transparent with a bottom border that glows gold when focused.
The South Indian Chart must be square.
Chat bubbles should be distinct: User (Right, Purple), AI (Left, Glass/Dark Grey).
implementation_steps: Step 1: Install fonts (Cinzel, Inter) via Google Fonts in index.css.
Step 2: Configure tailwind.config.js with the cosmic color palette and font families.
Step 3: Create the 'CosmicLayout' wrapper component with the nebula background.
Step 4: Build the 'SouthIndianChart' component using CSS Grid.
Step 5: Develop the 'BirthDetailsForm' with transparent inputs.
Step 6: Implement the 'ChatInterface' with typewriter effect for AI responses.
